name: Marie Calenders Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325-350°F (165-175°C).
2. Melt butter in a black skillet.
3. Mix all ingredients and add melted butter in a bowl. Stir well.
4. Grease a 9x9 inch pan with the remaining melted butter.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -=20
NOTES: Wonderful sweet cornbread, almost like cake. Really good with honey-butter.
Suzanne
